mission.title: valkey: [BUG] valkey-server slows down with `spop <key>` and `srandmember <key>` spinning in hashtableScanDefrag after a few hours
mission.description: [BUG] valkey-server slows down with `spop <key>` and `srandmember <key>` spinning in hashtableScanDefrag after a few hours. This issue affects 7+ users.

steps.title: Identify valkey troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your valkey installation:
```bash
valkey-server --version
valkey-cli ping
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review valkey configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant valkey configuration:
After a few hours of uptime, one of our valkey-server processes (Docker `8.1.1-alpine` and `8.1.1` images) starts consuming 100% CPU usage and only sporadically responds to application requests.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [BUG] valkey-server slows down with `spop <key>` and…
steps.description:
Tested with starting Valkey with `activedefrag no` instead, I observed the process staying at ~30% CPU usage for about 4 hours and then quickly ramp up to 100% within a few (~10) minutes.

The same set now shows this information:
```
127.0.0.1:38542> debug object urls:unretrievable
Value
```yaml
127.0.0.1:38542> debug object urls:unretrievable
Value at:0x725d06994530 refcount:1 encoding:hashtable serializedlength:1668169541 lru:1044411 lru_seconds_idle:0 lfu_freq:0 lfu_access_time_minutes:4079
(20.73s)
127.0.0.1:38542> debug htstats-key urls:unretrievable full
Hash table 0 stats (main hash table):
 table size: 14680064
 number of entries: 1850367
 top-level buckets: 2097152
 child buckets: 200170
 max chain length: 4
 avg chain length: 0.10
 chain length distribution:
   0: 1958960 (93.41%)
   1: 81106 (3.87%)
   2: 52290 (2.49%)
   3: 4700 (0.22%)
   4: 96 (0.00%)
Hash table 1 stats 
```

steps.title: Confirm [BUG] valkey-server slows down with `spop <key>`… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test valkey to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.
